title: GLOBAL CREATORS PROGRAM — Get Paid for Your Content
sourceNote: Mirrored from a Mulebuy event page (HTML capture). Payouts, caps, and eligibility are defined by Mulebuy — verify live terms before applying.
bodyHtml:
GLOBAL CREATORS PROGRAM—Get Paid for Your Content 


Create videos. Get paid. It’s that simple.

 

- Up to $30 per video


- Up to $10000/month


- Free shipping perks (next phase)


- 3%–7.5% commission


🔥 $50,000+ paid to creators — and growing daily

 

Apply Now To Join Us!


👉 https://bit.ly/Creators-Form

 


WHY JOIN


1. Start instantly — no need to wait for products 


2. Ready-to-use content assets provided 


3. Earn from your posts


4. Extra exposure support for top videos 

 

 

HOW IT WORKS


1. Copy your register link.


2. Generate Your Spreadsheet Link: findhuals.com/?ref=YOUR_CODE


*Add these two to your bio.


3. Post content (15–60s videos)


4. Submit links & get paid 

 


ABOUT CONTENT


👉 No experience needed — just start posting.


- The video is 15–60s


- Mulebuy is mentioned in the video and the caption.


- Links are in your bio


- Has correct hashtags

 


FAQ


How much can I earn?


 Up to $30/video, $900/month, plus Paid Partnership Spots, Free Shopping and Shipping


When do I get paid?


 Weekly review, monthly payout

 


Ready to Start Earning?


Takes less than 1 minute to begin 👇


👉 All Creator Guide (Must Read)


https://bit.ly/mulebuy-creator
